column1: # Programmes group placement sites and give them a shared context.
#   slug            URL-safe identifier. Must be unique. Cannot be changed later.
#   name            Display name shown in UI and emails.
#   service_type    One of: fsj | foj | bfd | weltwaerts | ijfd | other
#   focus_areas     Comma-separated from: education | ecology | social |
#   country         ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the target country.
#                   Examples: MX DE GH PE JP UG KE
#   coordinator_email   Email of the coordinator user (must exist in users.csv
#                       or already be in the system)
#   description     Free text. Optional. Use quotes if it contains commas.

column10: Einsatz in Biosphärenreservaten und Naturschutzprojekten in Mexiko
Unterstützung im Unterricht an Waldorfschulen in Ghana
Mitarbeit in Gemeinschaftskliniken und sozialen Projekten in Lima
